valid.name: int-column
valid.code: CREATE TABLE products (id bigint PRIMARY KEY);

errors.message: `NUMERIC` / `DECIMAL` without precision accepts unbounded magnitude and rejects nothing — it's a missed opportunity to encode the column's domain. Declare `NUMERIC(precision, scale)`.
`NUMERIC` / `DECIMAL` without precision accepts unbounded magnitude and rejects nothing — it's a missed opportunity to encode the column's domain. Declare `NUMERIC(precision, scale)`.
